page_metadata.biotools__summary: EST analysis pipeline which allows rapid analysis of large amounts of ESTs or cDNAs from mammals and fungi. Functional annotation of the dataset is also included via either FunCat or GO annotation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: EST analysis pipeline which allows rapid analysis of large amounts of ESTs or cDNAs from mammals and fungi. Functional annotation of the dataset is also included via either FunCat or GO annotation.
